en: We miss you on your side of the bed.
ja: ベッドのあなたの場所が恋しい
zhTW: 我想念你在床那邊的位置
vi: Toi nho em phia ben kia giuong
Do cua em van con o day

en: They stare at me like souvenir.
ja: お土産みたいにこっちを見つめてる
zhTW: 它們像紀念品一樣盯著我看
vi: Chung nhin toi nhu do luu niem

en: Don't wanna let you out my head.
zhTW: 不想讓你離開我的腦海
vi: Khong muon de em roi khoi tam tri

en: Just like the day that I met you.
ja: 君に出会った日のように
vi: Giong nhu ngay toi gap em
Ngay toi nghi la mai mai

ja: でもそれは永遠に続くって
vi: Nhung dieu do se keo dai mai mai

en: Like when you walked out my life.
ja: 君が去った時みたいに
zhTW: 就像你走出我的生命一樣
vi: Giong nhu khi em buoc khoi doi toi

en: Why you walk out my life?
zhTW: 你為什麼走出我的生命？
vi: Sao em roi khoi doi toi?

en: I get like this every time.
vi: Lan nao toi cung nhu vay
